title: cordyline alborosea
intro: Cordyline alborosea, a species of flowering plant, is native to New Zealand and is also known as the cabbage palm or mountain cabbage tree. The medicinal properties of Cordyline alborosea lie in its rhizomes, which are used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Traditionally, Cordyline alborosea is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues.
